sections.title: Set as Preferred Source on Google

content.text: IGNOU Re-Registration July 2026 : The Indira Gandhi National Open University (IGNOU) has Started the IGNOU July Re-Registration Process 2026 on May 15, 2026 in Online Mode on its Official Website; ignou.ac.in. Candidates Can Fill and Submit the IGNOU Re-Registration Form Till Last Date. IGNOU Re-Registration July 2026 are for the Candidates who are Already Enrolled in the Programme Affiliated with IGNOU.

rows.text: Indira Gandhi National Open University (IGNOU) UG / PG Re-Registration July Session 2026 WWW.

UG / PG Re-Registration Fees Course Wise Fees Details : Click Here UG / PG Programme Exam Fees Per Subject : 200/- (Pay Oct-Nov 2026) Payment Mode : Online Mode
